creator: karl@pielorz.com
text:
Hi,

Is there anything further I can do to help get this resolved/debugged? - We just did a mass-migration of FreeBSD systems from a number of Xen nodes (around 20 domU's) and all had their clocks messed up by the migration :(

I'm beginning to wonder if a workaround would be to used devd to hook one of the USB device 'changes' that happens after a migrate to force the system to drop ntpd / ntpdate - then restart it :(

-Karl
